GEP_X92-X52-X67_SW_40-50 S-lot V1 uniquement.

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 742
Recv ID: 762
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 04
Func Name: Direction assistée

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "446",
    "soft": "0000",
    "version": "0100"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 61443,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {
      "Voltage": "0"
    },
    "name": "Battery voltage"
  },

    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {
      "Engine status": "0"
    },
    "name": "CAN Engine Status fault"
  },

    "dtc": 53760,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {
      "Vehicle Speed_filtered": "0"
    },
    "name": "CAN Vehicle Speed fault"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22018,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "No tuning set"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22036,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {
      "ECU Temperature": "0",
      "Motor Temperature": "0"
    },
    "name": "HEPS Thermal protection"
  },

    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "HEPS fault - Motor"
  },
  {

    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "HEPS fault - NVM"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22024,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "HEPS fault - ECU"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 53804,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN Steering Wheel Angle fault"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 53803,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {
      "Angle volant_CAN": "0"
    },
    "name": "CAN Steering Wheel Speed fault"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 49408,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {
      "Vitesse volant_CAN": "0"
    },
    "name": "CAN Lost Communication with Engine Control Module"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 53248,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN Bus fault"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 49472,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN Lost Communication with Body Control Module"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 49449,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN Lost Communication with Brake Control Module"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 50200,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN Invalid Data Received from Brake Control Modul"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 50210,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN Invalid Data Received from Body Control Module"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 20584,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "HEPS Fault - Software"
  }
]
